title: Witch-Craft
description: Witch-Craft's goal is an expanded Vanilla experience with magic elements, focusing mainly on witchcraft!
body:
# **What is this pack for?**
Originally created for my server for me and my friends to enjoy, I have decided to publish it for easier access and for others to enjoy.

Creating this pack I'm trying to retain as much of the original Minecraft experience as possible whilst introducing one of my favourite genres of mods; Magic!

I have added a wide variety of performance improvement mods, and server utilities (including anti-xray), to keep it enjoyable for everyone.

# Credit to included external mods:
- Mowzie's Mobs - [Curseforge | Mowzie's Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs)

# Special thanks to:
- Chloe - For a lot of technical help
- Eva - For splash texts
